snippet.title: Introducing Pushpa Raj | Allu Arjun | Pushpa | Rashmika | Fahadh Faasil | DSP | Sukumar
snippet.description:
Introducing Pushpa Raj on Mythri Movie Makers. written and directed by Sukumar. Produced by Naveen Yerneni and Y. Ravi Shankar of Mythri Movie Makers in association with Muttamsetty Media, the film stars Allu Arjun, Fahadh Faasil and Rashmika Mandanna while Jagapathi Babu, Prakash Raj, Dhananjay, and Sunil play supporting roles.

The film's music is composed by Devi Sri Prasad, with cinematography and editing were performed by Miroslaw Kuba Brozek and Karthika Srinivas respectively. The film is scheduled to release on 13 August 2021, in Telugu along with dubbed versions in Malayalam, Tamil, Hindi and Kannada languages.

#Pushpa​ #IntroducingPushpaRaj #AlluArjun​ #PushpaTeaser #PreludeOfPushparaj #Rashmika​ #Faasil #Sukumar​ #DSP #MythriMovieMakers​ 

Directed by Sukumar
Produced by Naveen Yerneni, Y. Ravi Shankar
Starring: Allu Arjun, Fahadh Faasil, Rashmika Mandanna
Music by Devi Sri Prasad
Cinematography: Miroslaw Kuba Brozek
Edited by Karthika Srinivas
Production Companies: Mythri Movie Makers, Muttamsetty Media
Release Date:13 August 2021

snippet.title: Galat (Official Video) Asees Kaur | Rubina Dilaik, Paras Chhabra | Vikas | Raj Fatehpur
snippet.description:
VYRL Originals presents Galat by Asees Kaur and starring Bigg Boss fans two favourite contestants - Big Boss 14 Winner Rubina Dilaik and Paras Chhabra. Keeping melancholy as the central theme of this song, the hit trio of – Vikas as composer, Sunny Vik as the producer and the lyricist Raj Fatehpur have worked their magic yet again on Galat. Directed By TRU Makers the story narrates a tale of love and betrayal, with stunning performances by Rubina and Paras as the protagonist who will compel you to see the story unfold till the end. 

Which scene or lyrics impressed you the most? Tell us in the comments below…

#VYRLOriginals #RubinaDilaik #ParasChhabra

🎶 Listen 🎧  🎶 Now On 📲 🤳

♫ JioSaavn - https://www.jiosaavn.com/song/galat/RF4DWgxfVF8
♫ Gaana - https://gaana.com/song/galat
♫ Wynk - https://wynk.in/u/HmteEng78
♫ Spotify - https://open.spotify.com/album/7v02B7tDzQHcPpgXHsZeEm
♫ Resso - https://m.resso.app/ZSJ6KvryY/
♫ Amazon Prime Music - https://music.amazon.in/albums/B091HTH6ZZ
♫ Apple Music - https://music.apple.com/in/album/galat/1561142222?i=1561142475

📝 Lyrics

Warka Hauli Hauli Karke Palat Ho Reha Ae
Mainu Lagdey Meri Zindagi vich
Kuch Galat Ho Reha Ae

Oh Kise Hor Da Hona Chahunde Ne
Mainu Jhootha Pauna Chahunde Ne
Main Samjh Geyi han
Zindagi Cho Mainu Dhakka dena Chahunde Ne

Mere Nal Nal Eh Khali Khali
Falak Roo Reha Ae
Mainu Lagdey Meri Zindagi vich
Kuch Galat Ho Reha Ae

Main Waqt Kina Barbad Kara
Jad Bewafa Nu Yaad Kara
Main Paagal Ajj vi Har Kam Nu
Tera Naam Len Baad Kara

RAJ RAJ Main Yaad 
Teri Vich Khud Nu Kho Rahi
Main Ajj v Dardi Loka Ton
Barish Vich Roo Rahi

Dhokha Mere Nal Haye
Ab Talak Ho Reha Ae
Mainu Lagdey Meri Zindagi vich
Kuch Galat Ho Reha Ae

Kabhi Kabhi Tere Dard Mein Haye Sharaab Bhi Piti Hoon
Maine Suna Main Tere Chehre Se Dikhayi Deti Hoon

Mera Jeena Mera Jeena Zeher Ho Gya Hai
Mera Dil Mujhse Rooth Gya Haye Gair Ho Gya Hai

Pal Pal Mereya Saaha Da
Haye Katal Ho Reha Ae
Mainu Lagdey Meri Zindagi vich
Kuch Galat Ho Reha Ae

snippet.title: TVF's Aspirants | Web Series | Episode 1 | UPSC - Optional Me Kya Hai?
snippet.description:
One of the biggest and most ambitious dreams - to become an IAS officer! Here’s to the ones who are working hard to crack it. In this journey of rediscovering yourself and giving your best, make Unacademy your companion. Learn and be mentored by Top Educators and move closer to cracking your goal. Take a Free Live Class today!
Enroll Now - https://unacademy.onelink.me/M2BR/e3d9cc8c

As a UPSC Aspirant, choices are always tough when you have to select the subjects. But choices become even tougher when it's your last attempt and you are considering changing the optional subject. Abhilash is facing a dilemma. What will he do? Make the touch choice or just go with the flow? What do his friends have to say about it?

This examination season, we bring you the story of three friends who reunite to tell us all about UPSC Pre... Mains... Aur Life. 

Unacademy & The Viral Fever present ASPIRANTS - A TVF Original Series. 

Credits:
Created by: Arunabh Kumar & Shreyansh Pandey
Directed by: Apoorv Singh Karki 
Written by: Deepesh Sumitra Jagdish 
Produced by: Arunabh Kumar 
Executive Producers: Vijay Koshy, Shreyansh Pandey, Arun Kumar 
Supervising Producers: Haider Ali, Joshna Bhat 
Associate Director: Himali Shah 
D.O.P: Georgy John, Arjun Kukreti 
Editor: Tushar Manocha 
Background Score: Tusshar Mallek 
Music: Rohit Sharma 
Head of Post Production: Gaurav Rungta 
Casting: Ashish Khare, Shiv Chouhan 
Production Designer: Beeva Mahajan 
Costume Stylist: Yashika Kakkar 
DI Colorist: David Gabris (Futureworks Media Limited)
Sound Design: Pranit Purao 
Head of Finance: Manish Saini

Cast: Naveen Kasturia, Shivankit Parihar, Abhilash Thapliyal, Sunny Hinduja

UPSC fact #53: UPSC subject options are so confusing, they inspired a few of Imtiaz Ali’s film’s characters.
-The Description Guy.

#TVFAspirants #TVFOriginal #LetsCrackIt #UPSC 

This Channel is owned, operated, and managed by Contagious Online Media Network Private Limited.

In this journey of rediscovering yourself and giving your best, make Unacademy your companion. Learn and be mentored by Top Educators and move closer to cracking your goal. Take a Free Live Class today!
Enroll Now - https://unacademy.onelink.me/M2BR/e3d9cc8c

As a UPSC Aspirant, choices are always tough when you have to select the subjects. But choices become even tougher when it's your last attempt and you are considering changing the optional subject. Abhilash is facing a dilemma. What will he do? Make the touch choice or just go with the flow? What do his friends have to say about it?

This examination season, we bring you the story of three friends who reunite to tell us all about UPSC Pre... Mains... Aur Life. 

Unacademy & The Viral Fever present ASPIRANTS - A TVF Original Series. 

Credits:
Created by: Arunabh Kumar & Shreyansh Pandey
Directed by: Apoorv Singh Karki 
Written by: Deepesh Sumitra Jagdish 
Produced by: Arunabh Kumar 
Executive Producers: Vijay Koshy, Shreyansh Pandey, Arun Kumar 
Supervising Producers: Haider Ali, Joshna Bhat 
Associate Director: Himali Shah 
D.O.P: Georgy John, Arjun Kukreti 
Editor: Tushar Manocha 
Background Score: Tusshar Mallek 
Music: Rohit Sharma 
Head of Post Production: Gaurav Rungta 
Casting: Ashish Khare, Shiv Chouhan 
Production Designer: Beeva Mahajan 
Costume Stylist: Yashika Kakkar 
DI Colorist: David Gabris (Futureworks Media Limited)
Sound Design: Pranit Purao 
Head of Finance: Manish Saini

Cast: Naveen Kasturia, Shivankit Parihar, Abhilash Thapliyal, Sunny Hinduja

UPSC fact #53: UPSC subject options are so confusing, they inspired a few of Imtiaz Ali’s film’s characters.
-The Description Guy.

#TVFAspirants #TVFOriginal #LetsCrackIt #UPSC

snippet.title: TVF's Aspirants | Official Trailer | Episode 1 Streaming Now
snippet.description:
UPSC - One of the toughest exams in the world. Nothing comes easy when you are preparing for it as an Aspirant. In Delhi's Old Rajinder Nagar, thousands of people come every year with a dream of becoming an IAS officer. It takes a lot of hard work, perseverance and discipline to crack it. But it also takes a lot of heart to endure the pressure. 

This examination season, we bring you the story of three friends who reunite to tell us all about UPSC Pre... Mains... Aur Life.

Unacademy & The Viral Fever present ASPIRANTS - A TVF Original Series. Streaming from 7 April on YouTube.


Credits:
Created by: Arunabh Kumar & Shreyansh Pandey
Directed by: Apoorv Singh Karki

Produced by: Arunabh Kumar

snippet.title: INAAYAT | Tanzeel Khan | Ashi Khanna | (Prod. By Nemo)
snippet.description:
YEH GAANA USKE LIYE HAI JISKE NAAM KA MATLAB HAI BLESSING.. AND EVERYONE HERE KNOWS I CANT SING #Inaayat

This is a much awaited one, for you guys and for me!! 
Last year, I started my journey as an artist very unknowingly, I had no idea I had this incredible journey ahead of me!! 
It still seems like a blessing🤞🏻

Well, it all started because of a person very close to my heart! Actually it all started because all of this was FOR her! 
She’s the reason, my Inaayat 🤍

Thankyou so much Ashi for being my muse, my dilli ki ladki🤍 I HOPE YOU GUYS ENJOY THIS SONG, IT IS REALLY CLOSE TO MY HEART!
#TanzeelKhan #AshiKhanna #AkTk

snippet.title: ગુજરાતમાં ફરી લૉકડાઉન કરવા અંગે વિજય રૂપાણી શું બોલ્યા? | Lockdown in Gujarat
snippet.description:
ગુજરાત હાઇકોર્ટે રાજ્ય સરકારને કોરોનાની ચેઇન તોડવા કર્ફ્યુ લાદવાનું સૂચન કર્યું છે. 
 
હાઇકોર્ટે કહ્યું કે સરકાર 3-4 દિવસ કે વિકએન્ડ કર્ફ્યુ જેવાં પગલાં લે. 
 
રાજ્યમાં લૉકડાઉનની જરૂર પડે તેવી સ્થિત હોવાનું હાઇકોર્ટનું અવલોકન.

#gujaratlockdown #fourdayscurfew #gujaratcoronaupdate #lockdowningujarat



તમે અમારી સાથે જોડાઈ શકો છો :

snippet.title: Ripper - The Wanted Killer ft. @Karikku | Irul | Netflix India
snippet.description:
What happens when five friends decide to get together for a couple of drinks and risk a close encounter of the murderous kind?

A serial killer, crippling fear and paranoia: Are their fears misplaced, or are they warranted?

Find out how the night unfolds, and if you’re looking for another old-fashioned whodunit, catch Fahadh Faasil and Soubin Shahir in Irul, now streaming on Netflix.

Written & Directed by Nikhil Prasad
Cast: Anu K Aniyan, Arjun Ratan, Jeevan Stephen, Sabareesh Sajjin, Kiran Viyyath, Unni Mathews

DOP/Art: Sunil Karthikeyan
Edit: Anand Mathews
BGM and Sound Design: Charles Nazareth
Sound Engineer: Jishnu Ram
Poster Design: Binoy John
Associate Camera: Blessan K Mon
Colorist: Srik Varier 
DI Studio: Poetic prism and pixels studio
Production Coordinator: Biju Narayan
Production Assistants: Babitha Brahmanand, Vivek V Babu
Subtitles: Elvis John, Reem Nassim
Focus Puller: Appu
Gaffer: Binu P Varghese
Assistant Camera: Renju Jose
Camera Rentals: Mega Focus
Camera Team: Jinesh Balan, Shaji KK, Chandhu
Lights Rentals: Before & After Film Productions
Gimbal: Sachin, Pranav

Art Assistants: Biju Narayan, Babitha Brahmanand, Vivek V Babu

snippet.title: Daya ने बनाया बैंगन का Burger | तारक मेहता का उल्टा चश्मा | Haste Raho
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to LIV Comedy: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCBIT1FSJW6yTlzqK-31FDWg?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to watch all the comedy clips of your favorite shows: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLSXTaG1fT0cQDeknj5_H_O64mUh4_AAC5

Watch all the specially curated clips from your favorite shows and let the characters tickle your funny bone!

About The Show:
----------------------------
Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah is a comedy show inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chashmah' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This show revolves around Gada Family which consists of uneducated Businessman Jethalal Champaklal Gada, Jethalal’s Wife Daya & their naughty Son Tipendra Gada living in 'Gokuldham Co-operative Society' and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. In case of a problem and emergency, Jethalal Gada often rushes to Taarak Mehta to seek his help and guidance as he finds a philosopher in him. The residents of the housing society, help each other find solutions when they face common, real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

#tmkoc #taarakmehta

snippet.title: Taylor Swift - Mr. Perfectly Fine (Taylor’s Version) (From The Vault) (Lyric Video)
snippet.description:
Official lyric video for “Mr. Perfectly Fine” (Taylor’s Version) (From The Vault) – off her upcoming Fearless (Taylor’s Version) album. Get the album here: https://taylor.lnk.to/fearlesstaylorsversion. Get the song here: https://taylor.lnk.to/mpf

►Subscribe to Taylor Swift on YouTube: https://ts.lnk.to/subscribe 
 
►Exclusive Merch: http://taylorswift.lnk.to/store

►Follow Taylor Swift online:
Instagram: http://instagram.com/taylorswift  
Facebook: http://facebook.com/taylorswift  
Tumblr: http://taylorswift.tumblr.com  
Twitter: http://twitter.com/taylorswift13  
Snapchat: http://snapchat.com/add/taylorswift
Website: http://www.taylorswift.com  

►Follow Taylor Nation Online
Instagram: http://instagram.com/taylornation  
Tumblr: http://taylornation.tumblr.com  
Twitter: http://twitter.com/taylornation13
TikTok: http://tiktok.com/@taylornation

Official Lyrics:
 
Mr. perfect face
Mr. here to stay
Mr. looked me in the eye and told me you would never go away
Everything was right
Mr. I’ve been waiting for you all my life
Mr. every single day until the end I will be by your side
But that was when I got to know
Mr. change of heart
Mr. leaves me all alone
I fall apart
It takes everything in me just to get up each day
But it’s wonderful to see that you’re okay

Hello, Mr. perfectly fine
How’s your heart after breaking mine?
Mr. always at the right place at the right time, baby
Hello, Mr. casually cruel
Mr. everything revolves around you
I’ve been Miss misery since your goodbye
And you’re Mr. perfectly fine

Mr. never told me why
Mr. never had to see me cry
Mr. insincere apology so he doesn’t look like the bad guy
He goes about his day
Forgets he ever even heard my name
Well I thought you might be different than the rest
I guess you’re all the same
Because I hear he’s got his arm ‘round a brand new girl
I’ve been picking up my heart
He’s been picking up her
And I never got past what you put me through
But it’s wonderful to see that it never phased you

Repeat chorus

So dignified in your well pressed suit
So strategized
All the eyes on you
Sashay your way to your seat
It’s the best seat
In the best room
Oh, he’s so smug
Mr. always wins
So far above me in every sense
So far above feeling anything

And it’s really such a shame
It’s such a shame
Cause I was Miss here to stay
Now I’m Miss gonna be alright someday
And someday maybe you’ll miss me
But by then you’ll be Mr. too late

Goodbye, Mr. perfectly fine
How’s your heart after breaking mine?
Mr. always at the right place at the right time, baby
Goodbye, Mr. casually cruel
Mr. everything revolves around you
I’ve been Miss misery for the last time
And you’re Mr. perfectly fine
You’re perfectly fine
Mr. look me in the eye and tell me you

#taylorswift #mrperfectlyfine #fromthevault #fearlesstaylorsversion

But it’s wonderful to see that it never phased you

Repeat chorus

So dignified in your well pressed suit
So strategized
All the eyes on you
Sashay your way to your seat
It’s the best seat
In the best room
Oh, he’s so smug
Mr. always wins
So far above me in every sense
So far above feeling anything

And it’s really such a shame
It’s such a shame
Cause I was Miss here to stay
Now I’m Miss gonna be alright someday
And someday maybe you’ll miss me
But by then you’ll be Mr. too late

Goodbye, Mr. perfectly fine
How’s your heart after breaking mine?
Mr. always at the right place at the right time, baby
Goodbye, Mr. casually cruel
Mr. everything revolves around you
I’ve been Miss misery for the last time
And you’re Mr. perfectly fine
You’re perfectly fine
Mr. look me in the eye and tell me you

#taylorswift #mrperfectlyfine #fromthevault #fearlesstaylorsversion

Music video by Taylor Swift performing Mr. Perfectly Fine (Taylor’s Version) (From The Vault) (Lyric Video). © 2021 Taylor Swift

http://vevo.ly/enJPdT

snippet.title: Prelude of Pushparaj | Allu Arjun | Pushpa | Rashmika | Fahadh Faasil | DSP | Sukumar
snippet.description:
Prelude of Pushparaj on Mythri Movie Makers. Pushpa is an upcoming Telugu action thriller drama film, with Allu Arjun and Rashmika Mandanna in the lead roles along with Prakash Raj and Jagapathi Babu in key roles & Fahadh Faasil as villain. Written and directed by Sukumar. Produced by Naveen Yerneni, Y Ravi Shankar under Mythri Movie Makers in association with Muttamsetty Media. Devi Sri Prasad scoring music. The film will be released in Telugu along with dubbed versions in Tamil, Hindi, Kannada, Malayalam languages.

#Pushpa​ #PreludeOfPushparaj #AlluArjun​ #Rashmika​ #Faasil #Sukumar​ #DSP #MythriMovieMakers​ 

Click here to watch:

Uppena Deleted scene: https://youtu.be/TZGY-HJNt5g​

#AA20​ Movie Launch : https://youtu.be/cs_drz6Ps5I​

Rangasthalam Full Video Songs 4K : http://bit.ly/2tUdUsD​

Rangasthalam Songs Making : http://bit.ly/2KXeo8B​

Srimanthudu Full Movie : https://youtu.be/LS6XiINMc2s​

Janatha Garage Full Movie : https://youtu.be/_Nq2m5LRQ3g​

snippet.title: Director Sukumar Speech At Introducing Pushpa Raj - The First Meet Event | Allu Arjun | Rashmika
snippet.description:
Introducing Pushpa Raj - The First meet on Mythri Movie Makers. written and directed by Sukumar. Produced by Naveen Yerneni and Y. Ravi Shankar of Mythri Movie Makers in association with Muttamsetty Media, the film stars Allu Arjun, Fahadh Faasil and Rashmika Mandanna while Jagapathi Babu, Prakash Raj, Dhananjay, and Sunil play supporting roles.

The film's music is composed by Devi Sri Prasad, with cinematography and editing were performed by Miroslaw Kuba Brozek and Karthika Srinivas respectively. The film is scheduled to release on 13 August 2021, in Telugu along with dubbed versions in Malayalam, Tamil, Hindi and Kannada languages.

#Pushpa​​ #PreludeOfPushparaj​ #IntroducingPushpaRaj​ #AlluArjun​​ #Rashmika​​ #Faasil​ #Sukumar​​ #DSP​ #MythriMovieMakers​​ 

Directed by Sukumar
Produced by Naveen Yerneni, Y. Ravi Shankar
Starring: Allu Arjun, Fahadh Faasil, Rashmika Mandanna
Music by Devi Sri Prasad
Cinematography: Miroslaw Kuba Brozek
Edited by Karthika Srinivas
Production Companies: Mythri Movie Makers, Muttamsetty Media
Release Date:13 August 2021

Click here to watch:
Introducing Pushpa Raj : https://youtu.be/Lk2oDvoonUc
Prelude of Pushparaj: https://youtu.be/gbcpEbr6ECA

दशामाता की कथा || Dasha Mata Ki Katha || दशा माता व्रत कथा || Dasha mata ki kahani
आज 6 अप्रैल 2021 को #दशामाता के व्रत के अवसर पर मैं आप सभी के समक्ष दशा माता की  प्राचीन एवं पौराणिक कथा दशा माता की कथा प्रस्तुत कर रही हूं। दशा माता का व्रत होली के बाद दशमी दिन किया जाता है इसे होली की दशा भी कहा जाता है। दशा माता घर की बुरी दशा को अच्छी दशा में बदल  देती है और  धनधान्य तथा सुख समृद्धि प्रदान  करती हैं।  आज इस वीडियो में  मैं दशा माता की  पुराणों में वर्णित दशा माता व्रत  कथा लेकर आई हूं। दशा माता की कहानी के अनुसार राजा नल ने दशा माता के डोरे का अपमान किया था और परिणाम स्वरूप राज्य तथा पुत्र सुख सभी से वंचित हो गए थे। फिर उनकी पत्नी रानी दमयंती ने दशा माता का व्रत करके राजसी ठाठ-बाट, पुत्र पुत्र धनधान्य तथा सुख समृद्धि को पुनः प्राप्त किया। हे दशा माता,  जैसे आपने राजा नल और रानी दमयंती को उनका राज्य, मान सम्मान तथा सुख समृद्धि  फिर से प्रदान की, वैसे ही हम सब की दशा को भी हमेशा अच्छा  बनाए रखना। हम सब पर अपनी कृपा करना मां दशा माता। चलिए देखते हैं दशा माता की व्रत की कथा और जोर से बोलते हैं दशा माता की जय | दशा माता की जय

Hello friends, today on 6th April 2021, on the occasion of fasting of Dasha Mata, I am presenting to you all the ancient and mythological Dasha Mata vrat katha . The Dasha Mata vrat is observed on the tenth day after Holi and people listen #dashamatavratkatha on his day Holi Dasha. Dasha Mata transforms the bad state of the house into a good state and provides prosperity and happiness. Today in this video of Dasha mata ki vrat katha , I have brought the katha mentioned in Puranas of Dasha Mata. According to the Dash mata ki kahani,  King Nal insulted Dasha Mata's thread and as a result the he was deprived of his kingdom. Then his wife Rani Damayanti observed Dasha Mata vrat and regained d happiness and prosperity. O'Dasha Mata, just as you gave Raja Nal and Rani Damayanti their kingdom, honor and happiness and prosperity again, likewise keep the condition of all of us always good. God bless us all, Mother Dasha. let was watch Dasha mata ka vrat ki katha and say loudly #dashamata ki jai
tags: dasha mata ka vrat ki katha
dasha mata ka vrat ki kahani

കേരളത്തിലെ ഏറ്റവും മികച്ച വാര്‍ത്താ നെറ്റ്‌വര്‍ക്കാണ് മീഡിയവണ്‍ . ഏറ്റവും കൂടുതല്‍ പേര്‍ തത്സമയം മലയാളം വാര്‍ത്തകള്‍ കാണുന്ന മലയാളത്തിലെ മുന്‍നിര വാര്‍ത്താ ചാനല്‍. മൂല്യാധിഷ്ഠിതവും സ്വതന്ത്രവുമായ മാധ്യമപ്രവർത്തനം നടത്തുന്ന മലയാള ന്യൂസ് ടെലിവിഷൻ ചാനലാണിത്‌. ലോകമെമ്പാടുമുള്ള ഉറവിടങ്ങളിൽ നിന്ന്സമാഹരിച്ച കാലികവും സമഗ്രവുമായ  വാർത്തകളും പ്രോഗ്രാമുകളും വ്യത്യസ്തമായ രീതിയിൽ മീഡിയവൺ പ്രേക്ഷകരിലെത്തിക്കുന്നു. 

 24 മണിക്കൂറും ലോകത്തിന്‍റെ ഏത് ഭാഗത്ത് നിന്നും ഇവിടെ തത്സമയം #ലൈവ് കാണാം. അതിവേഗം വാര്‍ത്താ വീഡിയോകള്‍ ലഭിക്കാൻ മീഡിയവണ്‍ സബ്സ്ക്രൈബ് ചെയ്യൂ... ബെല്‍ ബട്ടണും ക്ലിക്ക് ചെയ്യൂ.

ഏറ്റവും പുതിയ  വാർത്തകൾക്കായി സന്ദർശിക്കുക: https://youtu.be/d1iwUB9YFnA
Watch the latest malayalam updates, Kerala news live and news around the world  with MediaOne News live TV
For more visit us: https://bit.ly/3iU2qNW

snippet.title: Cassata Ice Cream Recipe in Tamil | How to make Cassata Ice Cream at Home
snippet.description:
In this video we will see how to make cassata ice cream recipe at home. This casatta ice cream has thin cake base and three layers of ice cream and topped off with roasted nuts. I have chosen mango flavor, pistachio flavor and strawberry flavor for the ice creams for this recipe but you can use other flavors as well. I have used some crushed mango, strawberry and pistachio to add extra flavor and texture to the recipe. Because of the variety of flavors in this ice cream this is a perfect recipe for parties and celebrations.
#CassataIceCream #CassataRecipe #CassataCake

Friends, please do try this cassata ice cream at home and share it with your friends and family. Also please do share your feedback about the recipe in the comments below. All the best and happy cooking!

for Ice Cream :

1 Liter Milk (4 cup)
150 g Sugar(3/4 cup)
2 tbsp Butter
1 tbsp Corn flour + 3 tbsp Milk
2 tsp Vanilla extract

For Cake:
1/4 cup milk
1 tsp Lemon juice
1/4 cup Sugar
1 tbsp Oil
1 tsp Vanilla extract
1/2 cup Maida
1/4 tsp baking Soda
pinch of Salt
6 inch loaf pan
350 f/175 c for 15 min or 18 min in Pressure cooker on medium heat

For Mango Ice cream
1 cup Mango
4 tbsp Sugar
yellow food color
Ice Cream

For Pista Ice cream
25 Pistachios 
Green food color
Ice cream

For Strawberry Ice cream
1 cup Starwberry
4 tbsp Sugar
Pink food color
Ice cream
Cashews for garnishing

snippet.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah - तारक मेहता - Ep 3078 - Full Episode - 12th January, 2021
snippet.description:
Click here to subscribe to SAB TV: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6-F5tO8uklgE9Zy8IvbdFw?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to watch full episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6Rtnh6YJK7ZFhouqhrvP3Sx0U7qxdzJi

Episode 3078: Jethalal and Taarak Get Angry
---------------------------------------------------------------------------
Jethalal and Taarak get angry with Bhide because of the misunderstanding. They get into the fight first Jethalal and Taarak dominate Bhide but soon Bhide also gets angry. Jethalal finds a stick and starts running behind Bhide and everyone else also ran behind them. Watch the full episode.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues which are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.

The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.

snippet.title: Jupiter’s Legacy | Official Trailer | Netflix
snippet.description:
No legacy lives forever.

The first generation of superheroes have kept the world safe for nearly a century. Now their children must continue their legendary ideals. From the mind of Mark Millar, Jupiter’s Legacy is streaming only on Netflix May 7th, 2021.

Watch Jupiter’s Legacy, only on Netflix: https://www.netflix.com/JupitersLegacy 

SUBSCRIBE: http://bit.ly/29qBUt7

About Netflix:
Netflix is the world's leading streaming entertainment service with 204 million paid memberships in over 190 countries enjoying TV series, documentaries and feature films across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can watch as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, on any internet-connected screen. Members can play, pause and resume watching, all without commercials or commitments.

Jupiter’s Legacy | Official Trailer | Netflix
https://youtube.com/Netflix

They're the first generation of superheroes. But as they pass the torch to their children, tensions are rising — and the old rules no longer apply.

snippet.title: Shakti | शक्ति | Episode 1212 | Coming Up Next
snippet.description:
As Soumya and the ladies are involved in a celebration, Jeet sets up his next trap to hurt Soumya. Watch the sneak peek of the upcoming episode.
#ColorsTV #Shakti

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Set against the backdrop of culturally rich and vibrant Punjab, Shakti-Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki portrays the power of a family to dictate the fate of its daughters, Soumya and Surbhi. Deprived of an education, companions and toys, Soumya can't understand the indifference her father and Dadi show towards her and finds solace only in her mother's arms. Meanwhile Surbhi gets everything she wants, except for the one thing she yearns for-her mother's love. What has caused these heart-breaking rifts in this otherwise perfect family? What makes parents discriminate between their own daughters? Watch the mystery unfold.

snippet.description:

Episode 3139: Popatlal  Tries To Find Out The Culprit
---------------------------------------------------------
Popatlal calls Pooja but her phone is unreachable to which Popatlal starts to think negative . Sodhi asks Popatlal to be Optimistic and rather think about the box . Popatlal first doubts the Iron man but the Iron man swears on his bread and butter that he hasn't seen the box . Popatlal then doubts Mehta Sahab to know more watch the full episode. 

More Useful Links :
 * Visit us at : http://www.sonyliv.com
 * Like us on Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/SonyLIV
 * Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/SonyLIV
Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile
 * Google Play - https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.msmpl.livsportsphone
 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

snippet.title: Manjhi - The Mountain Man | Scene 8 | Nawazuddin Siddiqui | Radhika Apte | Viacom18 Studios
snippet.description:
Manjhi – The Mountain Man is a 2015 Indian Hindi-language biographical film based on the life of Dashrath Manjhi. Manjhi, widely known as the "Mountain Man", was a poor labourer in Gehlaur village, near Gaya in Bihar, India, who carved a path 9.1 metres (30 ft) wide and 110 metres (360 ft) long through a hill 7.6 metres (25 ft) high, using only a hammer and chisel.

#NawazuddinSiddiqui enacted the role of #DashrathManjhi, while Radhika Apte played Manjhi's wife. The film was released worldwide on 21 August 2015.

#ManjhiTheMountainMan 

Viacom18 Studios Handles :-

Facebook:- https://www.facebook.com/Viacom18Studios/
Twitter :- https://twitter.com/Viacom18Studios
Instagram:- https://www.instagram.com/viacom18studios

snippet.description:
Follow & Enjoy New Hindi Dubbed Full Movie "A Aa Part 2" Starring Nithiin, Samantha and Anupama Parameshwaran. Directed by Trivikram 

#AAa #Nithiin #Samantha #AnupamaParameshwaran #Part2 #AdityaMovies

Film Name  : A Aa
Director : Trivikram
Producer : Umesh Gupta 
Actor : Nithiin
Actress  : Samantha, Anupama Parameshwaran
Banner : Aditya Music India Pvt.Ltd. 

A Aa Movie Synopsis: 

Anasuya (Samantha) is a docile young woman who wants to break free from the clutches of her control-freak mom (Nadiya). While her mom is gone on a business trip, Anasuya sneaks up to the village of her maternal uncle. Vihari (Nithin) is Anasuya’s brother-in-law and he hosts her. Vihari’s wedding is already fixed with another girl. Anasuya’s mom gets her a wedding alliance. Rest of the story is all about the issue between these two families and how Anansuya Ramalingam and Anand Vihari unite at the end.

snippet.title: The MOST LUXURIOUS GAMING FACILITY in INDIA | First Glimpse at S8UL 2.0 ONE MILLION $ FACILITY
snippet.description:
S8UL IS PROUD TO SHOWCASE ONE OF THE MOST LUXURIOUS gaming facility in India. 
Valuating at 1 Million Dollar and built at 15000 sq. feet, it will be also the largest gaming facility in India.
@MortaL @8bit Thug and @8bit Goldy show you around this exclusive facility with a whopping 4 floors with all the state of art facility, which includes Streaming Cabins, Living Rooms, Recreational Areas, Modern Kitchen and Content Creation Space for all our Athletes and Content Creators.
We at S8UL, thank you all for making this possible and we ensure this is JUST THE BEGINNING.
Also together, let's take the future of gaming in India to Greater Heights.
#S8UL
Make sure to Follow us at :
Instagram :-  https://instagram.com/s8ul.esports?ig...

Set against the backdrop of culturally rich and vibrant Punjab, Shakti-Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki portrays the power of a family to dictate the fate of its daughters, Soumya and Surbhi. Deprived of an education, companions and toys, Soumya can't understand the indifference her father and Dadi show towards her and finds solace only in her mother's arms. Meanwhile Surbhi gets everything she wants, except for the one thing she yearns for-her mother's love. What has caused these heart-breaking rifts in this otherwise perfect family? What makes parents discriminate between their own daughters? Watch the mystery unfold.

snippet.description:

Episode 3138: Popatlal Misplaces The Mango Box
---------------------------------------------------------
The courier guy had misplaced the parcel so he came back to exchange the parcel and handover the actuall parcel which Popatlalt is supposed to recieve.In the mean while Popatlal starts to preach the courier guy how he should perform his duties . The courier guy is in hurry so he asks Popatlal to give him the box of Mangoes then is when Popatlal realizes that he has misplaced the box of mangoes to know more watch the full episode.

More Useful Links :
 * Visit us at : http://www.sonyliv.com
 * Like us on Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/SonyLIV
 * Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/SonyLIV
Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile
 * Google Play - https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.msmpl.livsportsphone
 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

seter Sari samaj tala khon inn apnar me Jay jug lagit Ten bundi miya,,

snippet.title: Is Qadar Teaser | Tulsi Kumar, Darshan Raval |Sachet-Parampara|Sayeed Quadri |Releasing 8 April 2021
snippet.description:
Presenting the song teaser of Tulsi Kumar and Darshan Raval’s new romantic song “Is Qadar”. The music of this latest song is directed by Sachet-Parampara, lyrics penned by Sayeed Quadri. The video is directed by Arvindr Khaira. The full song is set to release on 8 April 2021

snippet.title: Tum Na Jaane Kis Jahan Mein Kho Gaye | Sanam
snippet.description:
Our #SANAMrendition of the song ‘Tum Na Jaane Kis Jahan Mein Kho Gaye’.

Shot in a 400+ year old bungalow in Goa. It’s almost like every little thing shown in the video has it’s own story to tell. We hope the intensity of the lyrics, melody and visuals keep you gripped till the end! 

Lots of love! 

Like, Share, Comment, Subscribe and STAY SAFE !!! 

#SANAMsingle #weareSANAM


SANAM: 
Sanam Puri - Vocals
Samar Puri - Guitars
Venky S - Bass
Keshav Dhanraj - Drums

Video Credits:

Director of Photography: Charudatta Rane
Editor: Samar Puri
Producer: Mithun Bhat
Colorist: Tushar Patel & 
Rishav Chakraborty (Pixel Grabber Studios) 
DI Producer - Saket Kath

Line Producer: Pam Fernandes, Domnic Pereira

Lighting: Danny Gomes, D & A Productions
Generator: Paresh Genset

#ColorsRishtey #Beintehaa

About Super Dancer 4 : 
---------------------------------------------------
Now in its fourth season, Super Dancer is a popular children's dance reality show. Spearheaded by Bollywood actress Shilpa Shetty, renowned choreographer Geeta Kapoor and Bollywood Director Anurag Basu, the show looks for 'Dance ka Kal'. After nationwide auditions, the judges select 12 children who are extraordinary dancers, aged between 4 to 13. These 12 dancers are paired with popular and able choreographers, the Super Gurus. Along with their Gurus, the kids compete to become Super Dancer - Dance Ka Kal.

snippet.title: Swaragini | स्वरागिनी | Episode 191
snippet.description:
Annupurna and Sujata plan to find the truth about Swara and Ragini. Later, Ragini realises that Annupurna has laid a trap for her. Ragini leaves for the farm house to stop the truth being revealed.

#ColorsRishtey #Swaragini

To subscribe this channel go to: https://www.youtube.com/c/ColorsRishtey1/featured

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

To go to the show playlist please click: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLX18mvVSh-bwL5H8eIQ6w51VWKyjzA0oU

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/colorsrishteyindia
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/rishteytv/

'Swaragini' is a story about Swara and Ragini, who belong to warring families, but later realise that they are in fact half-sisters. Out of sheer hatred, Ragini manipulates Swara's love interest, Lakshaya into marriage, while Swara ends up getting married to Lakshya's brother, Sanskar. Once he learns the truth, Sanskar swears to reunite Swara with Lakshya, but in turn falls in love with her. Will Swara choose her lover over her husband, or will the sanctity of holy matrimony triumph?

snippet.title: Qayamat - Episode 27 Teaser - Digitally Presented by Master Paints - 6th April 2021 | Har Pal Geo
snippet.description:
Qayamat - Episode 27 Teaser - Digitally Presented by Master Paints - 6th April 2021 | Har Pal Geo

https://bit.ly/30JSSPr Geo is the hub for all your Pakistani entertainment needs! Hit the bell icon and subscribe to become a part of our growing community, now hitting the USA

Qayamat Digitally Presented by Master Paints

Qayamat is a story of a young and beautiful girl whose life decisions are dominated by those around her. Eventually, all hell breaks loose when the people closest to her repeatedly make the same mistake making her future bleak. Ifrah along with her parents and elder sister Samra belongs to the lower middle class and believes in hard work and honesty. Ifrah and Samra’s parents are put in a tough spot when Ifrah’s uncle Mukhtar asks for Samra’s hand in marriage for his son Rashid. The families agree to the proposal without taking Samra’s approval however soon after marriage Samra suffers mistreatment from Rashid until she meets a tragic incident leaving Ifrah to face the dire consequences.
Unable to learn from their past mistake, Ifrah’s parents agree to the wishes of Mukhtar and Rashid leaving Ifrah alone. Despite being aware of Rashid’s vicious and ill-behavior, will Ifrah follow the path of her elder sister Samra? Or will she forsake her true self in the need for revenge? Despite all the hardships and the pain of losing a loved one, how will Ifrah respond to the situation around her?
Written by: Sarwat Nazeer
Directed by: Ali Faizan
Produced by: Abdullah Kadwani & Asad Qureshi
Production House: 7th Sky Entertainment

Cast :
Ahsan Khan
Neelum Munir
Amar Khan
Haroon Shahid
Saba Faisal
Shabbir Jan
Noor-Ul-Hasan
Kinza Malik
Sana Fakhar
Mizna Waqas
Haris Waheed

snippet.title: Bijapur naxal attack पर cobra commando balraj singh ने जो बताया आपको अंदर से हिला देगा
snippet.description:
तेरा तुझको अर्पण के लिए यहां क्लिक करें - https://rb.gy/e6w2nf

Sardar Balraj took off the turban to save the life of fellow jawan. Kobra commando soldier Balraj Singh, while fighting with Naxals, saw that fellow officer SI Abhishek Pandey was shot at by them. Balraj Singh voiced many times for the help of SI Pandey, but no one reached for help. On which, when Sardar Balraj did not get anything to save the life of fellow officer, Balraj Singh took took off his turabn. Watch this exclusive conversation with balraj singh.
